title: Trump extended the ceasefire — now what? CFR analysis
snippet: Council on Foreign Relations analysis on the implications of the 3-week ceasefire extension. Key questions: Will Israel honor it given Bint Jbeil strikes? Can Pakistan mediation survive Ghalibaf exit? Does War Powers May 1 deadline force Trump's hand? CFR argues extension buys time but doesn't address root issues. Notes Hezbollah rejection as key risk to Lebanese front stability.
tag_reason: CFR analysis integrating multiple threads — ceasefire extension, Ghalibaf exit, War Powers deadline, Hezbollah rejection. High-quality analytical source.
